title: Yoga and the Need of Its Integration in Modern Medicine.

assets.abstract: Growing evidences of the health benefits of yoga are available in the literature. But physicians are not aware of it. Databases like PubMed, PubMed Central, Google Scholar, and Scopus are searched for the articles on preventive, therapeutic, and rehabilitation potential of yoga. Scientific evidences available are analyzed and incorporated into the article. Yoga provides relief from stress, anxiety, depression, and obsessive thoughts. It promotes better sleep. It relieves psychosomatic disorders.

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Breath and soul — pranayama, breath-brain coupling, respiratory-brain interaction, cardiorespiratory entrainment, vagal pathways of consciousness.
